race.comment: FIERCENESS (3) is ready for the 1600m now and gets in light with the 3kg claim. Returned good closing splits to flash late and secure second over 1400m at Newcastle. Can stalk the good tempo and prove hard to hold out. MASTER OF WAR (7) another from the Matt Smith yard desperate to shed his Maiden tag. Showed a stack of fight when jumped in trip for a gritty on-pace second over 1800m at Hawkesbury. Comes back in trip and will prove hard to get past. DEAL N' DASH (1) lightly raced gelding with the upside to win this first-up. Ran third over this trip in BM78 class at Randwick two-back. Fitted with the two searching trials and can figure prominently. MATCHSTICKS (6) found the 1200m too sharp second-up with a fading eighth at this track. Bred to get the trip and not without top-four claims.
